questions.question: WHO member states reached a draft legally‑binding pandemic preparedness pact on 16 April 2025, despite which major donor’s withdrawal?
What is the full form of the NAKSHA programme, the second phase of which was launched in 2025 by the Ministry of Rural Development?
questions.option_1: National Area Keeping Survey for Habitats
questions.option_2: NAtional geospatial Knowledge-based land Survey of urban HAbitations
questions.option_3: New Analytical Knowledge for Housing Areas

questions.question: The Idukki Disaster Resilience and Information System (IDRIS), India’s first integrated early warning and planning platform using AI and real-time data, was launched in which Indian state?

Which missile was successfully flight-trialed by DRDO and the Indian Navy from Integrated Test Range, Chandipur, Odisha, in 2025, demonstrating capability against ship targets when launched from a Sea King helicopter?

Akashteer, which is India’s fully indigenous, automated Air Defence Control and Reporting System, that played a vital role during conflict with Pakistan in May 2025, was developed by which of the following organisations?
In 2025, on which date was the International Day for Biological Diversity observed globally?
Which of the following companies has launched a commercial space surveillance satellite named SCOT in March 2025?
Which of the following organisations successfully conducted the first flight trial of a stratospheric airship platform at Sheopur, Madhya Pradesh, to enhance military surveillance capabilities?
When was K Sanjay Murthy sworn in as the Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG) of India by the president of India?
India's first prototype fast-breeder reactor to be commissioned by September 2026, is located at which of the following places?
Who was assigned the portfolio of Health & Family Welfare, Transport, and Information Technology in the new Delhi cabinet formed in February 2025?
Which of the following Indian startups was selected to develop the country's first indigenous large language model under the India AI Mission April 2025?
How many Amrit Stations were inaugurated by Prime Minister Narendra Modi on 22 May 2025?
What is the primary objective of the Waqf (Amendment) Act, 2025?
questions.option_1: To repeal the Waqf Act, 1995 and abolish Waqf Boards
questions.option_2: To restrict the establishment of new Waqf properties
questions.option_3: To nationalise all Waqf properties under central government control and conduct an audit of new Waqf properties
questions.option_4: To enhance transparency and inclusivity in the management of Waqf properties

questions.question: In which venue was the World Health Summit (WHS) Regional Meeting 2025 hosted for the first time in India?
In December 2024, India's Defense Ministry signed a contract with HAL for the procurement of how many Su-30MKI aircraft?
Which two state governments held official-level talks in Guwahati in April 2025 to resolve the long-standing inter-state border dispute?
Which of the following Indian Coast Guard Ships participated in NAVDEX 2025, strengthening India-UAE maritime cooperation?
In which Swiss city was the annual meeting of the World Economic Forum (WEF) held in January 2025?
Which Indian female shooter won a silver medal in the women's skeet event at the ISSF Junior World Cup 2025?
Which institution celebrated the Rashtriya Boudhik Sampada Mahotsav (RBSM) on 29 May 2025?
questions.option_1: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology, Amethi
questions.option_2: Indian Oil Institute of Petroleum Management, Haryana
questions.option_3: Indian Institute of Petroleum and Energy, Visakhapatnam

questions.question: In May 2025, India assumed the chairmanship of which regional organisation focused on productivity enhancement?
questions.option_3: Bay of Bengal Initiative for Multi-Sectoral Technical and Economic Cooperation (BIMSTEC)
questions.option_4: South Asian Association for Regional Cooperation (SAARC)

questions.question: The recipient of the Padma Shri in 2025, Hriday Narayan Dikshit, who is a renowned thinker, philosopher, politician and social worker, belongs to which Indian state?
What is the name of India's indigenous counter-drone system tested in May 2025?
Which Indian state is set to host the country's first AI-centric Special Economic Zone (SEZ)?
